sizing_rule.note: Optimal f sizing: After win allocate 1 contract per 3.076923077 units equity (f≈0.325); after loss allocate 1 contract per 5.714285714 units equity (f≈0.175). Derived from 2:1 coin-toss scenario. Multi-system uncorrelated allocation: 1 unit per 4.347826 units equity (f≈0.230). Formula: equity / divisor = contracts to trade

source_rule_text: Position size based on optimal f calculation: make 1 bet for every 3.076923077 units in stake after a win, and 1 bet for every 5.714285714 units in stake after a loss to maximize long-run growth.
